sources.title: Small business and self-employed tax center
sources.summary: Tina starts here for the current IRS small-business hub, filing links, and federal business topic navigation.

sources.title: Sole proprietorships
sources.summary: Tina uses this page to anchor the supported owner-return lane to the IRS sole-proprietor rules.

sources.title: Forms for sole proprietorship
sources.summary: Tina uses this page as the IRS checklist for which federal business forms normally travel with the owner-return lane.

sources.title: Instructions for Schedule C (Form 1040) (2025)
sources.summary: This is Tina's core federal line-by-line authority for the supported 2025 Schedule C lane.

sources.title: Instructions for Schedule SE (Form 1040) (2025)
sources.summary: Tina watches this as the IRS companion authority for self-employment tax tied to the supported owner-return lane.

sources.title: About Form 4562, Depreciation and Amortization (Including Information on Listed Property)
sources.summary: Tina uses this page to know when depreciation and listed-property reporting becomes part of the federal business packet.

sources.title: Instructions for Form 4562 (2025)
sources.summary: Tina uses these instructions when asset treatment or depreciation affects the supported Schedule C package.

sources.title: About Form 8829, Expenses for Business Use of Your Home
sources.summary: Tina watches this page so home-office treatment does not get mistaken for an already-complete supported lane.

sources.title: Instructions for Form 8829 (2025)
sources.summary: Tina uses these instructions when actual home-office expenses need federal form coverage or a blocker note.

sources.title: About Form 8995, Qualified Business Income Deduction Simplified Computation
sources.summary: Tina watches this page so QBI-related companion forms do not quietly fall out of the federal packet.

sources.title: Instructions for Form 8995 (2025)
sources.summary: Tina uses these instructions when QBI treatment matters to the supported federal owner-return lane.

sources.title: About Publication 334, Tax Guide for Small Business (For Individuals Who Use Schedule C)
sources.summary: Tina uses Publication 334 as a broader IRS reference around the supported Schedule C owner-return lane.

sources.title: About Publication 587, Business Use of Your Home (Including Use by Daycare Providers)
sources.summary: Tina keeps this publication in the registry because home-office questions are common and currently need honest IRS-backed scoping.

sources.title: About Form 1040-ES, Estimated Tax for Individuals
sources.summary: Tina watches this page so owner-return estimated-tax obligations stay visible around the supported business packet.

sources.title: Recommended reading for small businesses
sources.summary: Tina uses this page as the IRS-curated reading list for the small-business owner-return lane.

sources.title: Post-release changes to tax forms, instructions and publications
sources.summary: Tina watches this IRS change feed so updated forms or instructions can force a recertification pass before exports stay trusted.

sources.title: Tax Calendar
sources.summary: Tina watches the IRS business tax calendar for deadline-sensitive changes around the supported lane.

sources.title: e-News subscriptions
sources.summary: Tina keeps this IRS subscription hub in the registry so a future watcher can follow small-business update channels.
